title: Switch universe source to Binance USDT-M Futures

requirements.text: Replace universe endpoint in safeFetch base configuration from https://api.binance.com to https://fapi.binance.com for Futures API access

quotes: Switch universe source to Binance USDT-M Futures only

acceptanceCriteria: safeFetch utility uses https://fapi.binance.com as base URL
All universe-related fetches target Futures API endpoints

requirements.text: Update fetchUniverse24h function in binanceApi.ts to call https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v1/ticker/24hr endpoint for Futures USDT-M perpetual contracts
acceptanceCriteria: fetchUniverse24h calls /fapi/v1/ticker/24hr endpoint
Function returns array of Futures ticker data or empty array on failure

requirements.text: Modify universeFilter.ts to filter universe to ONLY symbols ending with 'USDT' and explicitly exclude all symbols containing 'USDC' (case-insensitive check on the full symbol string)

quotes: Universe must include ONLY: Symbols ending with USDT
Explicitly EXCLUDE: All symbols containing USDC

acceptanceCriteria: Filter rejects any symbol not ending with 'USDT'
Filter rejects any symbol containing 'USDC' anywhere in the string (case-insensitive)
USDC exclusion check runs before volume threshold filtering

requirements.text: Add validation in universeFilter.ts to exclude stable-to-stable pairs by checking if base asset (symbol without 'USDT' suffix) matches any stablecoin identifier: USDC, BUSD, TUSD, FDUSD, USDP, DAI, UST, PAX, USD1 (case-insensitive)
acceptanceCriteria: Extract base asset by removing 'USDT' suffix
Reject symbol if base asset matches any stablecoin identifier (case-insensitive)
Stable-to-stable exclusion runs after USDT/USDC filtering but before volume threshold

requirements.text: Update universeFilter.ts to parse quoteVolume using Number(item.quoteVolume) and apply volume threshold filter (>= 5,000,000) AFTER proper numeric conversion

quotes: Parse quoteVolume using: const vol = Number(item.quoteVolume)
Apply volume threshold AFTER proper parsing

acceptanceCriteria: Parse quoteVolume with Number() before comparison
Volume threshold check (>= 5,000,000) happens after numeric conversion
NaN values from parsing are logged but not excluded from processing

requirements.text: Add UNIVERSE_SOURCE log event immediately when fetchUniverse24h is called, with payload containing { source: 'FUTURES_USDTM', endpoint: '/fapi/v1/ticker/24hr' }
acceptanceCriteria: UNIVERSE_SOURCE event logged at start of universe fetch
Payload includes source='FUTURES_USDTM' and endpoint path
Event appears in logs before UNIVERSE_FILTERED or UNIVERSE_DEBUG_SAMPLE

requirements.text: Update universeFilter.ts fallback logic to apply same USDT-only, no-USDC, no-stable/stable filters when filtered.length === 0, then sort by quoteVolume descending and return exactly top 5 symbols (not 20)

quotes: Fallback must also respect: USDT only, No USDC, No stable/stable, Max 5 symbols

acceptanceCriteria: Fallback filters raw universe to USDT-ending symbols only
Fallback excludes all USDC-containing symbols
Fallback excludes stable-to-stable pairs (base asset check)
Fallback sorts remaining by quoteVolume DESC and returns exactly 5 symbols
UNIVERSE_FALLBACK event logged when fallback executes

requirements.text: Add UNIVERSE_SOURCE to LogEntry type union in frontend/src/types/store.ts
acceptanceCriteria: UNIVERSE_SOURCE added to LogEntry type union
Type definition follows existing log structure with timestamp and payload fields

requirements.text: Update LogsTab.tsx to display UNIVERSE_SOURCE log event type with default color coding (not red or yellow)
acceptanceCriteria: UNIVERSE_SOURCE events render in logs panel
Event uses default color (not error red or warning yellow)
Payload displays source and endpoint information

constraints: Do NOT modify RSI calculation logic (rsiCalculator.ts)
Do NOT modify entry gate rules (entryGates.ts)
Do NOT modify exit evaluation logic (exitEvaluator.ts)
Do NOT modify risk model calculations (riskManager.ts)
Do NOT modify strategy constants (1% risk, 0.6% stop, TP1/TP2 levels, 45min time stop)
Do NOT change engine tick interval (15 seconds)
Do NOT change TOP5 rotation schedule (15 minutes)
Do NOT change cooldown duration (30 minutes after SL only)
Preserve all existing logging events and log structure
nonGoals: Modifying RSI parameters or calculation method
Changing entry/exit gate thresholds or conditions
Adjusting position sizing or risk percentages
Adding WebSocket or real-time data streams
Mixing Spot and Futures data in universe
